data.title: Crypto billionaire Justin Sun graces the daily cover of Forbes
data.description:
Justin Sun, the 34-year-old founder of Tron, landed the daily cover of Forbes after dumping over $80 million into Donald Trump’s crypto startup, World Liberty Financial, helping the U. S. president and his family pocket around $400 million. The cash came in during a chaotic stretch—Trump had just returned to the White House, and Sun was […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/justin-sun-graces-the-daily-cover-of-forbes/

data.title: Will Trump's 25% Auto Tariffs Take A Toll On Bitcoin?
data.description:
President Donald Trump's newly announced 25% tariff on foreign auto imports has added a layer of uncertainty to global markets—and cryptocurrency is not immune. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/03/44521011/will-trumps-25-auto-tariffs-take-a-toll-on-bitcoin?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: DeCharge Raises $2.5M to Tackle EV Charging Infrastructure Gap
data.description:
Startup aims to combine high-speed urban charging with rural coverage using a decentralized hosting model and Solana-powered infrastructure.
source: https://solanafloor.com/news/de-charge-raises-2-5-m-to-tackle-ev-charging-infrastructure-gap

data.title: After the Binance voting results were announced, MUBARAK fell 14%, while others rose
data.description: After Binance announced the latest coin listing voting results, according to GMGN data, MUBARAK fell 13.96% in 1 hour, Broccoli rose about 70% in 1 hour, TUT rose about 193% in 1 hour, and BANANA rose about 10% in 1 hour, but the fluctuations were large.

data.title: Bpifrance Launches €25M Cryptocurrency Fund in France
data.description:
Bpifrance initiates a €25M fund to propel French crypto assets, enhance blockchain innovation, and support digital economy growth.
source: https://coincu.com/328951-bpifrance-25m-crypto-fund

data.title: Tokenized securities expands, as investors turn to predictable passive income
data.description:
Tokenized US government bonds are expanding, with more diverse tokenization issuers. The trend follows the market peak at the end of 2024, after which protocols and whales were looking for reliable passive income products.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tokenized-securities-expands-as-investors-turn-to-predictable-passive-income/

data.title: Decentralized exchange Hyperliquid rolls out ETH spot trading shortly after merging HyperCore and HyperEVM
data.description:
The project recently merged HyperCore, the core infrastructure behind the Hyperliquid L1, to its EVM-based HyperEVM developer ecosystem.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/348512/decentralized-exchange-hyperliquid-rolls-out-eth-spot-trading-shortly-after-merging-hypercore-and-hyperevm?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Binance will list 4 tokens and trading pairs including MUBARAK
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will list Mubarak (MUBARAK), CZ'SDog (BROCCOLI714), Tutorial (TUT) and BananaForScale (BANANAS31) at 21:00 (UTC) on March 27, 2025, and open MUBARAK/USDT, MUBARAK/USDC, BROCCOLI714/USDT, BROCCOLI714/USDC, TUT/USDT, TUT/USDC, BANANAS31/USDT, BANANAS31/USDC trading pairs. Users can start depositing 1 hour before trading opens, and withdrawals will be open at 21:00 (UTC) on March 28, 2025. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches Ghiblification (Ghibli)
data.description: According to market news, Binance Alpha launched Ghiblification (Ghibli).
